description: PI-directed narrow re-validation of ONLY the code/test-backing dimension (C1/C2). Code has been the high-yield dimension (caught the p45 fabrication in rem1 + the production c_lipschitz_joint wiring in rem2, both of which the claims reviewer accepted). This pass confirms the rem2 code fixes held (production c_lipschitz_joint = C_3 = 1 not the sqrt-value; test_paper46_c3_operator_system.py envelope-max-commutes tight at <1e-9; the relabeled withdrawn-formula tests; the foundation test ==0.0) and that no test still vacuously/false-positively backs a withdrawn quantity. Per the /qa all-dimensions rule this exercises 1 of 5 gating dimensions => INCONCLUSIVE-for-cert by construction; it is a code-dimension validation only. Seeds in worktree ../geovac-qa-seed-group1-rem3 (branch qa-seed-group1-rem3, base HEAD ecdb61f = v4.42.0). NEVER committed; worktree removed at end. Seeds are ALL code/C2 (vacuous tolerances), one per paper-with-substantive-tests, at NEW sites distinct from cert5/rem1/rem2.

seeds.location: l.80 (T3: restricted seminorm identically zero -- the K+ annihilation keystone)
seeds.planted: Changed 'assert restr.max() < TOL' -> 'assert restr.max() < 1e9' (vacuous; restr.max() is a non-negative norm, so <1e9 asserts nothing). Guts the load-bearing annihilation check (restricted seminorm == 0).
seeds.truth: The K+-restricted Lipschitz seminorm VANISHES identically (restr.max() < TOL=machine-eps); a 1e9 tolerance defeats the annihilation keystone's backing.

seeds.planted: Changed 'assert sup > np.sqrt(1 - 1 / n_max) + 0.5' -> 'assert sup > -1' (vacuous; sup is a non-negative op-norm ratio, so > -1 always true). Different site from rem2 (l.103 envelope-max).
seeds.truth: The sup op-norm ratio is nowhere near sqrt(1-1/n_max) (it is 1.74/2.74/3.14, exceeding it by >0.5) -- one of the three pillars refuting the withdrawn sqrt-constant. A '> -1' tolerance asserts nothing.

seeds.planted: Changed 'assert prop == 2' -> 'assert prop >= -1' (vacuous; prop is -1 for non-achievable or a positive int, so >= -1 always true). Different site from rem1 (l.202 max_residual).
seeds.truth: The propagation number is exactly 2 on the achievable envelope (load-bearing for p48 B3 pre-compactness). A '>= -1' tolerance asserts nothing and would pass even for prop=-1 (non-achievable).

seeds.planted: Changed 'assert ...["umegaki"]["chain_violations"] > 50' -> '... > -1' (vacuous; chain_violations is a non-negative count, so > -1 always true). Different site from cert5 (l.96 dmax chain_violations).
seeds.truth: The Umegaki chain FAILS generically (90/96 violations > 50) -- the load-bearing contrast that demotes the Umegaki panel to illustrative and motivates the D_max replacement. A '> -1' tolerance asserts nothing.

controls.claim: K+ annihilation (restr seminorm == 0) genuinely bit-exact; product-carrier signature-agnostic. Do NOT flag the genuine annihilation/product-carrier tests.

test_paper46_c3_operator_system.py envelope-max-commutes is TIGHT (<1e-9, rem2 fix held); substrate-spans + op-norm-ratio tests genuine; production c_lipschitz_joint = C_3 = 1 (rem2 fix). Do NOT flag these as wrong.
N_t=1 bit-exact reduction (max_residual==0.0, rem1-era; foundation test l.202 is ==0.0 in real corpus); prop=2 genuine.

the 3 relabeled test_c3_joint_panel_sup_*_withdrawn_formula tests + c_lipschitz_joint==1.0 assertion are the CORRECT post-rem2 state (the sqrt-arithmetic is documented-withdrawn, C_3=1 is the constant). Do NOT recommend restoring the sqrt as the constant.

do_not_reflag_remediation: ALL prior fixes through v4.42.0 are CORRECT and must not be re-flagged. Especially the rem1/rem2 code fixes: (rem1) p45 C3 transport, c3_joint_panel_sup docstring reframe; (rem2) production build() c_lipschitz_joint -> C_LIPSCHITZ_JOINT_ASYMPTOTIC=1.0 (C_3=1), test_paper46_c3_operator_system.py envelope-max tight <1e-9, the 3 relabeled withdrawn-formula tests, test_lorentzian_propinquity.py c_lipschitz assertion ==1.0. The sqrt(1-1/nmax) per-harmonic/envelope formula is WITHDRAWN as the C3 constant (C_3=1 is correct); c3_joint_panel_sup computing the sqrt-arithmetic as a documented-historical function (no longer wired live) is CORRECT. che_perales venue DGA 103 (2026) correct. Only the code/C2 dimension is exercised this pass.
